center.name: 海洋地殼
center.summary: 海洋地殼是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Markham's storm petrel，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The birds were more common in the relatively shallow waters above the continental crust (the continental shelf) and less common in the deeper waters above the oceanic crust, and more common in areas where the surface water is cooler and saltier. As a highly pelagic species, the birds are only rarely seen from shore. Despite its range, Markham's storm petrel only nests in Peru and Chile in the Atacama desert, in natural cavities in saltpeter (salt crusts rich in nitrates). The known colonies range in area from , with a density between 0.5 and 248 nests per hectare
